method_summary: The authors organized a hackathon to explore the use of generative AI for research and education in materials science, focusing on participants' ability to critically evaluate and use AI-generated content for software trials and development.
key_innovation: A structured hackathon design that emphasizes the critical evaluation of AI-generated content for scientific workflows, rather than just its generation.
title: Exploring utilization of generative AI for research and education in data-driven materials science
